parameters.content: Fire with `POST {{webhook}}/campaign  {"topic": "tool theft"}`. Each format runs its own tournament — generated, guardrail-gated, mission/quality-scored and founder-rebalanced inside the core. Winners are returned for the founder to send into the approval queue. Add more httpRequest nodes for Reels / Stories / partner-safe / press versions as needed.
